home.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer with 10+ years of experience building scalable web platforms. Specializing in Python backends and Vue.js/Nuxt.js frontends — focused on product companies where engineering directly drives business outcomes.

about.title: About me
about.p1: I'm a full-stack engineer who leans heavily on the backend side. I write production Python daily — Flask, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy — and I've shipped significant frontend work in Vue.js and Nuxt.js across e-commerce, betting, and lead-generation platforms.
about.p2: I care about code quality, automated testing, and practical problem-solving. I use AI-assisted tools like Cursor and GitHub Copilot not as shortcuts but as force multipliers for delivery without compromising quality.

cta.title: Looking for a senior engineer?
cta.subtitle: I'm open to senior individual contributor and lead roles at product companies. Let's talk about what you're building.

about.title: Who I am and how I work
about.subtitle: Full-stack engineer with a backend focus, based in Belgrade, Serbia. I've spent over a decade building and maintaining production systems across diverse domains.

background.title: Background
background.p1: I started my career in a fast-moving agency environment where shipping quickly and adapting to different stacks was the default. That foundation taught me to ramp up fast on unfamiliar codebases — a skill I've leaned on throughout my career.
background.p2: Over the years I've worked across e-commerce, sports betting, and lead-generation platforms. My longest engagement was as a Senior Backend Developer at BlueGrid, where I worked embedded in the Recharge.com engineering team for five years — maintaining a complex core codebase, building internal AI tooling, and mentoring junior developers.
background.p3: Today I specialize primarily in Python backends (Flask, FastAPI, SQLAlchemy) with meaningful frontend experience in Vue.js and Nuxt.js. I've also done maintenance and debugging work in React and built full-stack features in Laravel/PHP early in my career.

approach.title: How I approach work
approach.p1: I'm practical first. When facing a complex problem I look for the solution that solves it cleanly without over-engineering — three similar lines are usually better than a premature abstraction. I write automated tests because I've seen what happens when you don't.
approach.p2: I use AI-assisted tools (Cursor, GitHub Copilot, Gemini) daily. Not as a crutch, but as a force multiplier. I'm deliberate about where AI adds leverage and where it introduces noise.
approach.p3: I care about the broader context of what I'm building — the business problem, the user impact, the operational costs. Good engineering is engineering that serves the product.

looking.title: What I'm looking for
looking.p1: I'm looking for a role at a product company — not outsourcing or staff augmentation. I want to work on a product I can learn inside out, contribute to long-term decisions, and see the impact of my work on real users.
looking.p2: Senior IC or tech lead roles interest me most. I like mentoring junior engineers and being involved in architectural decisions, but I want to stay hands-on with the code.
looking.p3: Remote-friendly is a plus. I'm open to occasional travel for team meetings.

experience.subtitle: 10+ years across e-commerce, betting, and lead-generation platforms. Mostly backend, always full-stack capable.

jobs.title: Senior Backend Developer
bullets: Developed an AI-powered internal tool using Flask and Google Gemini API for merchant sentiment analysis, including automated categorization and cross-source data integrity checks.

Maintained the core codebase, implementing complex features and resolving hard-to-replicate production bugs to ensure platform stability.
Mentored junior developers and advocated for best practices in automated testing and code quality.

bullets: Developed high-performance betting games and software — 70% frontend (Vue.js, Nuxt.js) and 30% backend (Python).
Managed and mentored a growing engineering team, playing a key role in scaling the company from 10 to ~30 employees.
Led delivery of critical client projects that supported the company's rapid market expansion.

projects.title: Case studies
projects.subtitle: Selected commercial projects — focused on the problem, the solution, and the measurable outcome. Details are kept high-level to respect NDAs.

items.title: AI-Powered Merchant Sentiment Analysis Tool
items.problem: The merchant support team was manually sifting through thousands of merchant feedback signals across multiple data sources, with no unified view and no way to detect sentiment trends at scale.
items.solution: Built an internal Flask application integrating the Google Gemini API to automatically classify and summarize merchant sentiment. Implemented cross-source data integrity checks and automated categorization pipelines, with a clean internal UI for the support team.
items.result: Transformed a manual, error-prone review process into an automated workflow. The team gained actionable insights in hours instead of days, enabling faster and more targeted merchant interventions.

items.title: Automated Codebase Refactor via Custom Python Parsers
items.problem: A large-scale structural refactor was estimated to take the entire engineering team several months of tedious, error-prone manual work with high risk of introducing regressions.
items.solution: Built custom Python AST-based code parsers and transformation scripts that could automatically traverse, analyze, and rewrite the affected codebase patterns. Developed the tooling iteratively with test coverage to validate each transformation step.
items.result: Reduced a multi-month manual effort to a single week. Zero regressions introduced. The approach became a template for subsequent refactor tasks on the same codebase.

items.title: Real-Time Betting Game Platform
items.problem: Multiple betting clients needed custom, high-performance game UIs with real-time state sync, complex animation requirements, and tight latency constraints under high concurrent user load.
items.solution: Architected and delivered a series of betting game applications using Nuxt.js on the frontend for SSR performance and Vue.js for reactive real-time UI. Python backend services handled game logic, state management, and integrations with third-party providers.
items.result: Delivered several game titles on schedule that became core revenue drivers for clients. The frontend architecture established a reusable pattern adopted across multiple subsequent projects.
